title: Espaa Valorum
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
His Eminence '''[[Prince]] Espaa Valorum''' was the [[Dark Lord of the Sith|Master of the Sith]], a [[Dark side of the Force|Bogan]] Master. His second in command was [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader]].<ref name="Second Draft">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/adventures-of-the-starkiller-second-draft|text=Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|archivedate=20240818175509}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The name [[Valorum (The Star Wars)|Valorum]] first appeared in the [[The Star Wars rough draft|rough draft]] as a [[Knights of Sith|Knight of Sith]]. After being demoted to [[Stormtrooper|stormtrooper]] after failing to capture the Rebels aboard a [[Baltarian freighter]] and witnessing the [[Torture|torture]] of [[Annikin Starkiller]] aboard the [[Space Fortress]], Valorum became disgusted with the Empire, and joins the heroes in escaping the space station as it is destroyed.<ref name="Rough Draft">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/the-star-wars-rough-draft|text=''The Star Wars: Rough Draft''|work=[https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller Starkiller — The Jedi Bendu Script Site]|archivedate=20240601042406}}</ref>

In the [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]] he was renamed Dodana,<ref name="First Draft">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller/the-star-wars-revised-first-draft|text=''The Star Wars: First Draft''|work=[https://www.starwarz.com/starkiller Starkiller — The Jedi Bendu Script Site]|archivedate=20240904070909}}</ref> but this name was reused in the [[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars|next version]] of the script for a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] [[General]], a character we know as [[Jan Dodonna]]. Valorum, now given a first name, is not present in any scenes, and fills a position analogous to the [[Darth Sidious|Emperor]] in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''A New Hope'']].<ref name="Second Draft" /> He isn't mentioned in later drafts.

Espaa Valorum shares a surname with [[Finis Valorum]], penultimate [[Supreme Chancellor]] of the [[Galactic Republic]]. The two share few similarities, however.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref> The notion of a Sith rejecting the dark side could have informed Darth Vader's redemption in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

Espaa's first name may be the origin of [[Mos Espa]]. In the [[The Star Wars first draft|first draft]], [[Bail Antilles (The Star Wars)|Bail Antilles]] is called "Bomoje Espaa."<ref name="First Draft" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1975-01-XX -->''[[Adventures of the Starkiller, Episode I: The Star Wars]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 2007-04-24 -->''[[The Making of Star Wars: The Definitive Story Behind the Original Film]]''
